title: Just A Bit More Apples
description: This mod adds more apples in the game to enhance the player's experience with apples
body:
Do you ask yourself that why there are golden apples but no baked apples in minecraft? Now here they are!

Baked apples can be obained by putting apples in a smoker or on a campfire.

Also, iron apples are added and they are crafted similarly to a golden apple but uses iron ingots instead of gold ingots. They give haste effect after eaten.
